

Proxy Configuration Notes

There are two separate proxy-related values:

* PipelineNoProxy: used by the pipeline agent/proxy configuration.
* FunctionNoProxy: used by the deployed Function App NO_PROXY app setting.

A validation step has been added so the pipeline fails early if the proxy values are missing or unresolved.


-----------------------------------------


Function App App Settings

The Function App app settings use the Dataverse runtime keys:

* dataverse:ClientId
* dataverse:ClientSecret
* dataverse:TenantId
* dataverse:Url

Dataverse:ClientId and Dataverse:ClientSecret are backed by the existing D365 Key Vault secret references.

DataverseTenantId and DataverseUrl are passed from Azure DevOps Library variables into Terraform.

The DIA exception notification app settings are also configured for runtime notification handling:

* DiaExceptionNotification__SenderConfigKey
* DiaExceptionNotification__RecipientConfigKey

These values are Dataverse TPC Configuration Key names used by the Function App to retrieve the configured sender and recipient values. They are not the actual email addresses.
